case_title: QI MON YEE VS. LORIN CROPSEY BARTLETT et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,615.25 FILED BY YEE, QI MON AS TO DEFENDANT BARTLETT, LORIN CROPSEY BAUER, KELSEY NYAMTENEEN, SOYOMBA ZUL, NYAMZAYA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER--CONNIE YEE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2012 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, QI MON AS TO DEFENDANT BARTLETT, LORIN CROPSEY
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT IS "APPROVED", AND TRIAL CONTINUED TO AUG-30-2012 AT 8:30 AM DEPT.#506 - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-25-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SOYOMBA NYAMTENEEN, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CONNIE YEE--CANTONESE INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $20 SERVED SEP-28-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NYAMTENEEN, SOYOMBA

DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT ZUL, NYAMZAYA
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS MAILED TO MARK T. LOBRE, ESQ.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEE, QI MON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NYAMTENEEN, SOYOMBA ZUL, NYAMZAYA $2,805.49 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,985.49, DEFENDANTS SOYOMBA NYAMTENEEN AND NYAMZAYA ZUL SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF AS THESE DEFENDANTS ARE 100% RESPONSIBLE LIABLE FOR THIS ACCIDENT. DEFENDANTS LORIN CROPSEY BARTLETT AND KELSEY BAUER, SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF NOTHING -0- AS THEIR CONDUCT WAS NOT A CAUSE OF THIS AUTO ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, QI MON AS TO DEFENDANT BAUER, KELSEY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, QI MON AS TO DEFENDANT ZUL, NYAMZAYA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-30-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2012 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-08-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
